test case id: tc-weathersequence-001 title: verify weather functionality works as expected module: weather source pages: 2,4 preconditions: application is launched and user is signed in. test data: valid location name. test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. tap on the "weather" button. 3. enter a valid location name. 4. verify local weather is displayed. 5. tap on the magnifying glass icon. 6. enter another valid location name. 7. verify weather for the new location is displayed. expected result: local and new weather should be displayed correctly.
